text.title: Cognitive Inclusion Design Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree from observable signals to a rule-grounded conclusion.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the surface a multi-step flow or a passive page?

conclusion.verdict: apply chunking + progress + escape-hatch; expose settings
patterns overkill; verify just predictability + escape on the single screen

example.trace: loan-application onboarding → multi-step flow → chunk-long-flows → patterns + settings spec produced

text.example: Trace through the tree producing the leaf conclusion.
